q14
Sin congestión (throughput ≈ arrivalrate): 
		req	   rate
		100000000  1000000 =  100.300s =  1.7 min
		1000000000 1000000 = 1000.500s = 17.0 min
Con congestión:   
		200000000  2000000 =  143.100s =  2.4 min
		500000000  2000000 =  332.201s =  5.5 min
		800000000  2000000 =  553.430s =  9.2 min
		1000000000 2000000 =  700.889s = 11.7 min

sourcedatagen1       1 fix      732617.14929064141987008362 forward 1.00000004963297493790
calc2                1 fix      479693.63073020294714635873 forward 1.00000003747796412195
watermarkassigner3   1 fix      297444.36539869204155349575 forward .99999986832066806573
minibatchassigner4   1 fix      306886.83055718400426300756 forward 1.00000000000000000000
calc5                1 fix      387411.84299278209875633334 forward .26051879507430350710
nexmarkq146writer    1 fix      166126.08716123771808301529 none 1.0


q21
Sin congestión (throughput ≈ arrivalrate): 
		req	   rate
		50000000   500000 =  100.591s =  1.7 min	
		500000000  500000 = 1004.694s = 17.0 min
Con congestión: 
 		10000000  1000000 =   19.000s =  0.3 min
		100000000 1000000 =  192.331s =  3.2 min
		500000000 1000000 =  925.829s = 15.4 min

q22
Sin congestión (throughput ≈ arrivalrate): 
		req	   rate
		100000000  1000000 =  100.5530s =  1.70 min
Con congestión:
		1000000000 1000000 = 1126.8990s = 18.70 min
		200000000  2000000 =  202.4980s =  3.37 min
		500000000  2000000 =  516.7160s =  8.61 min
		800000000  2000000 =  815.9430s = 13.60 min

sourcedatagen1       1 fix      767598.75000000000000000000 forward 1.00000000000000000000
calc2                1 fix      472886.25000000000000000000 forward 1.00000000000000000000
watermarkassigner3   1 fix      342021.25000000000000000000 forward 1.00000000000000000000
minibatchassigner4   1 fix      361583.75000000000000000000 forward 1.00000000000000000000
calc5                1 fix      1049148.75000000000000000000 forward .92000000000000000000
nexmarkq226writer    1 fix      93449.72826086956521739130 none 1.0



each 10 s:
	bash get_query.sh $(bash get_job_id.sh) | jq -r '.duration'
	bash get_suboperator_metrics.sh source 0 | jq '.metrics["write-records"]'
